task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface is visible with the 'Mobile Banking App' project selected in the header or sidebar.
A list of time entries is shown, displaying a 4.00-hour entry with the comment 'External security analysis' associated with the 'Asset Design' work package.

task_completion.description: Open the edit form for the time entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit form or modal for the specific time entry (4.00 hours, 'External security analysis') is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Change the work package to 'Security Audit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the time entry edit form, the work package field is set to 'Security Audit'. The hours and comment fields must remain unchanged.

task_completion.description: Save the time entry and verify it is under the correct work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The updated time entry list shows the 4.00-hour entry with the comment 'External security analysis' now associated with the 'Security Audit' work package.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying OpenProject, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing time entry rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original time entry under 'Asset Design' is no longer present in the final screenshots, confirming it was moved and not duplicated.

integrity.description: The hours and comment of the time entry were not altered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hours remain exactly 4.00 and the comment remains exactly 'External security analysis' in the final saved state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 'Mobile Banking App'. Wrong work package: 'Asset Design'. Correct work package: 'Security Audit'. Time entry hours: 4.0. Time entry comment: 'External security analysis'.
